# Fibrebond (Eaton) — Modular Power Enclosures
Last updated: 2026-03-25

## Status: ENTERPRISE SCALE — Willow Glen / Large Site Deployments

## Overview
- THE modular power enclosure manufacturer
- 51,000+ modules deployed
- 1M+ sq ft manufacturing
- $378M revenue — acquired by Eaton for $1.4B
- Builds pre-integrated power enclosures (not bare containers)
- Active LED expansion project in Webster Parish, LA

## Contact
- Location: Minden, LA (Webster Parish)
- Parent company: Eaton

## Pricing
- Est. $100,000–$300,000+ per unit (enterprise, all-in)

## Why Fibrebond for ADC
- Eaton subsidiary = single-vendor power + enclosure stack
- Louisiana-based manufacturer = Buy American, local jobs
- Pre-integrated = power distribution built in, not field-assembled
- Right scale for Willow Glen (200 MW) and large deployments

## Use Case
Not for ADC 3K pods (overkill/cost). Target: Willow Glen, Trappeys enterprise build-out, hyperscaler deployments.

## Next Step
Engage via Eaton contact JP Buzzell (VP, Global Data Center Segment)
